BEDBUG & FLEA CONTROL

Our local pest control provides you with solutions and advice regarding bed bugs & fleas.

Indicators of a bed bug infestation

Being bitten is one of the most prevalent indicators of a bed bug infestation. Bed bugs are nocturnal and feed on human and pet blood while you sleep, leaving behind itchy bites on your skin. If you notice clusters of small, red bites on your body, especially on areas like arms, legs, and neck, it could be a sign of a bed bug infestation. Another sign to look out for is bloodstains. Bed bugs can be crushed while feeding, leaving behind small bloodstains on bedding, mattresses, or walls. Look for tiny red or brown stains on your sheets, pillowcases, or walls near your bed. Bed bugs of UK also excrete dark, rusty-colored fecal matter that looks like small dots or smears on bedding, mattresses, or walls.

Look for these signs near your bed or other areas where you suspect bed bugs may be hiding. Another early sign of bed bugs is shed skins. Bed bugs shed their skins as they grow, leaving behind tiny, translucent skins that are about the size of a pinhead. 

Dealing with a bed bug infestation

If you are dealing with a bed bug infestation, don’t hesitate to contact us. We offer effective and affordable bed bugs pest control services in the UK. We understand that bed bugs can cause a lot of discomfort and frustration. This is why we use the latest techniques and equipment to eliminate them from your home or business.Our team of experts is highly trained and experienced in spraying bed bugs and handling bed bug infestations of any size, and we use safe and eco-friendly methods to ensure that your space is free of bed bugs.
 

Why Choose Us

Experienced and Professional Team:

​Our team of experts is highly trained and experienced in handling pest UK infestations. We use the latest techniques and equipment to ensure that your space is free of pests.

Safe and Eco-Friendly Methods:

We use safe and eco-friendly methods to eliminate pests from your home or business. Our methods are effective and will not harm you, your family, or the environment.

Competitive Prices:

We offer competitive prices for our pest control services in the UK. We believe that everyone deserves to live in a pest-free environment, which is why we offer affordable solutions to our customers.

24/7 Availability:

We understand that pest infestations can occur at any time, which is why we offer 24/7 availability for our pest control services. We are reliable and available to provide assistance when you require it the most.

Follow-up Visits

Once the initial treatment is complete, the pest control specialist will schedule follow-up visits to ensure that the infestation has been completely eliminated. This may involve one or more visits over a period of several weeks or months. During these visits, the specialist will check for signs of pest activity and apply additional treatments if necessary.

Prevention

As part of the pest control service, the pest control specialist will also provide tips on preventing further infestations. This may include sealing cracks and crevices, keeping food stored in airtight containers, and eliminating standing water sources. By following these tips, homeowners and business owners can help to prevent future infestations
